privileged_info_summary: This is a synthetic date format standardization task with 20 sales transactions spanning Q1 2024 (Jan 5 - Mar 15). The data intentionally contains three mixed date formats: MM/DD/YYYY (3 dates: 01/05/2024, 01/06/2024, 01/07/2024), DD-MM-YYYY (7 dates: 08-01-2024 through 25-01-2024), and YYYY-MM-DD (10 dates: 2024-02-01 through 2024-03-15). All dates are in strict chronological order. Task requires standardizing all dates to YYYY-MM-DD format. Key verification facts: 20 total data rows, 180-second timeout, 50 max steps, medium difficulty, 75% pass threshold (verified in README). Verifier uses composite scoring: 50% format compliance, 30% date validity, 20% chronological logic. Dates outside 2020-2025 year range are considered invalid. Major chronological reversals (>30 days backward) incur -30 point penalty; minor reversals (5-30 days backward) incur -10 point penalty. Data is entirely synthetic, created via bash script in setup_task.sh.
